strategies.name: High Growth
strategies.description: Concentrated in high-growth technology and consumer discretionary companies. Accepts higher volatility for outsized long-term returns.

strategies.name: Dividend Income
strategies.tagline: Steady income through quality dividend payers
strategies.description: Focuses on companies with consistent dividend growth histories and strong free cash flow. Lower volatility with reliable compounding income.

strategies.name: Deep Value
strategies.tagline: Undervalued companies trading below intrinsic value
strategies.description: Identifies fundamentally sound businesses trading at meaningful discounts to fair value. Requires patience for mean reversion to play out.

strategies.name: Defensive
strategies.description: Built to withstand economic downturns. Heavy in recession-resistant sectors with strong balance sheets and predictable cash flows.

strategies.name: Balanced Core
strategies.tagline: Diversified across sectors and risk profiles
strategies.description: Well-diversified portfolio spanning all major sectors. Blends growth and income for consistent risk-adjusted returns over a full market cycle.

rules.title: Position Sizing
rules.body: No single holding exceeds 10% of portfolio. Top 5 holdings capped at 40% combined.

rules.title: Rebalancing
rules.body: Rebalance when any allocation drifts more than 5% from target. Review quarterly.

rules.title: Stop Loss
rules.body: Exit positions down more than 25% from cost basis unless the original thesis remains fully intact.

rules.title: Quality Filter
rules.body: Minimum Health Score of 70 before entering any new position via the Screener.

rules.title: Earnings Review
rules.body: Re-evaluate every holding within 48 hours of its earnings release. Update thesis or exit.

rules.title: Liquidity Rule
rules.body: Keep minimum 5% cash reserve. Never invest money needed within 12 months.
